arts.ttl: Club World Cup prize money: How much Chelsea, Man City & Real Madrid could make
arts.sum: The six South American participants will earn $15.2m each, while clubs from Africa, Asia and North and Central America will take home $9.55m just for qualifying. FIFA have confirmed the distribution of prize money and appearance fees for this summer's month-long tournament in the United States, with 32 clubs reaping the lucrative rewards after qualifying for the inter-continental competition.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Man City among clubs 'keeping tabs' on Serie A goalkeeper ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Chelsea and Manchester City are reportedly keeping tabs on Roma goalkeeper Mile Svilar ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Haaland accused of leaving mascot Moonbeam with head injury: Man City cover up claims
arts.sum: Manchester City find themselves in hot water over claims that Erling Haaland caused a head injury to club mascot Moonbeam and then covered it up. Haaland accused of leaving mascot Moonbeam with head injury: Man City cover up claims

arts.ttl: Brazil place Man City's Pep Guardiola on 'three-man managerial shortlist' following Dorival Junior dismissal
arts.sum: Brazil are reportedly considering Pep Guardiola as a potential target after placing the Manchester City boss a three-man managerial shortlist.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola believes Bournemouth defeat was the start of Man City’s troubles
arts.sum: City suffered their first league defeat of the season at Bournemouth in November.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has already confirmed his stance on Brazil job as Man City handed manager scare
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been linked with the vacant Brazil manager post, but his past comments make it clear that he is unlikely to leave Manchester City just yet.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola speaks out on replacing Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's position at Tottenham has come into question this season after a difficult time in the Premier League and Bournemouth's Andoni Iraola has been touted as a replacement

arts.ttl: 'Last chance' - Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton agree on Man City FA Cup quarter-final prediction
arts.sum: City will look to move into the FA Cup semi-finals for the seventh successive year

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola 'on three-man shortlist' for his dream job as Man City exit route emerges
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has seen a job that may pique his interest become available and he is said to be on the shortlist alongside Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer predicts every FA Cup quarter final with blunt warning for Man City
arts.sum: The FA Cup resumes this season with Nottingham Forest, Manchester City and Aston Villa still in the hunt as Alan Shearer casts his eye over the quarter-final ties
